status_boundary: PASS_SOURCE_COVERAGE means the POS_GEOM_2017 source text and extracted claim contain triangulation and push-forward language as methods for constructing canonical forms of positive geometries. It is not a mathematical proof, not a triangulation-independence theorem, not an S2* theorem, not substrate evidence, and not a physical settling-law result.

support_summary.allowed_inference: triangulation and push-forward may be cited as positive-geometry canonical-form construction/readout methods
support_summary.blocked_inference: Formation Medium dynamics, substrate realization, physical settling law, or computation-replacement claim
support_summary.checked_interface: source coverage for triangulation/push-forward as canonical-form construction methods
